This indicates that the native's father will experience a broken family life. He
will have two wives. His business will be related to essences. -

174 BHRIGU NANDI NADI
The native will not be in any particular trade till he passes his 23rd year.
He will be married between his 20th and 21st year. The conjunction of Venus
with Jupiter and Mercury indicates that his wife will be well educated, well
behaved and religious . .T he native will benefit by his wife's good fortune.
